title: Params for iam.role_detach
description: Canonical parameters when detaching a role/policy from a principal. The vendor identifier shape varies (AWS PolicyArn, Azure roleAssignmentId, GCP role+member tuple) — params['policy_id'] is the abstraction. The subject.selector_value identifies the principal (user, group, service account, managed identity) ; params['policy_id'] identifies WHICH policy to detach. Connectors MAY accept additional vendor-specific keys via additionalProperties=true.

policy_id.description: Vendor-specific policy/role identifier to detach (AWS PolicyArn, Azure roleAssignmentId fully-qualified path, GCP role string).

scope.description: Optional scope at which to detach (Azure subscription/resource-group path, GCP project/folder/organization). Implementation-specific.
